heading: Dividends to pay premiums
label: 1946 Dividends to pay premiums
text: Until and unless the Secretary has received from the insured a request in writing for payment of dividends in cash or that the dividends be placed on deposit in accordance with the provisions of the insured’s policy, any regular annual dividends shall be applied in payment of premiums becoming due on insurance after the date the dividend is payable on or after .December 31, 1958
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section and substituted “Secretary” for “Veterans’ Administration”.Pub. L. 102–83section 746 of this title1986— substituted “the insured’s” for “his”.Pub. L. 99–576
